title: Intense Smoked Venezuelan Corn Onigiri
description: A mustardy and crumbly Venezuelan dish with smoked paprika, shaped into nigiri and wrapped in pandan leaves, perfect for a quick snack.

ingredients.name: smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: use high quality paprika for best flavor

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the mustard seeds and cook until they start to pop.
Add the corn kernels, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the water to the skillet and continue cooking for another 2 minutes, until the corn is tender.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
Lay a pandan leaf flat on a work surface, with the stem end facing you.
Place a small amount of the corn mixture in the center of the leaf.
Shape the mixture into a triangle, and fold the leaf over the filling to form a triangle.
Serve the onigiri at room temperature or chilled.
